title: Fix ping_l2 test identifier typos
description: Trigger: building lichen/tests/ping_l2. lichen/tests/ping_l2/src/main.c references undefined identifiers test_ll_addr, s_s_test_ll_addr, and s_s_test_ctx at lines 191, 199, 221, 231, 250, 285, and 286. Impact: the Zephyr ping_l2 test does not compile, so ICMPv6/link-layer coverage is absent even when the test target is selected. Replace the typos with the defined test context/address symbols and add this test to the normal Zephyr test gate.
close_reason: Implemented fixes in assigned subagents and ran available focused checks; full Zephyr builds remain blocked by existing workspace/module setup issues.
